data.name: InsufficientStock
data.value: Insufficient stock for product '{0}' (SKU: {1}). Requested: {2}, Available: {3}.

data.name: CannotUpdateShippedOrder
data.value: Cannot update an order that has already been shipped.

data.name: InvalidOrderStatus
data.value: Invalid status: '{0}'. Valid values: Pending, Paid, Shipped, Cancelled.

data.name: CannotCancelShippedOrder
data.value: Cannot cancel an order that has already been shipped.

data.name: FailedToCancelOrder
data.value: Failed to update order status to cancelled.
